001package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service.repository;
002
003import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.AcceptedState;
004import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.IssueReport;
005import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.IssueType;
006import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.UserProfile;
007import java.time.Instant;
008import java.util.List;
009import java.util.Optional;
010import java.util.UUID;
011import org.springframework.data.domain.Page;
012import org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable;
013import org.springframework.data.domain.Sort;
014import org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;
015
016/**
017 * Spring Data repository for {@link IssueReport} persistence operations.
018 */
019public interface IssueReportRepository extends JpaRepository<IssueReport, Long> {
020
021  /**
022   * Finds an issue report by external identifier.
023   *
024   * @param externalId report external ID.
025   * @return optional containing the report if found.
026   */
027  Optional<IssueReport> findByExternalId(UUID externalId);
028
029  /**
030   * Finds issue reports for a user profile with the specified pageable definition. order.
031   *
032   * @param userProfile report owner.
033   * @param pageable sort order.
034   * @return matching issue reports.
035   */
036  Page<IssueReport> findByUserProfile(UserProfile userProfile, Pageable pageable);
037
038  /**
039   * Counts the number of issue reports owned by the specified user profile.
040   *
041   * @param userProfile report owner.
042   * @return total number of matching reports.
043   */
044  long countByUserProfile(UserProfile userProfile);
045
046  /**
047   * Returns a user's reports ordered by first-reported time descending.
048   *
049   * @param userProfile report owner.
050   * @return matching issue reports.
051   */
052  List<IssueReport> getIssueReportsByUserProfileOrderByTimeFirstReportedDesc(
053      UserProfile userProfile);
054
055  /**
056   * Returns reports in a specific accepted state ordered by first-reported time descending.
057   *
058   * @param acceptedState accepted state.
059   * @return matching issue reports.
060   */
061  List<IssueReport> getIssueReportsByAcceptedStateOrderByTimeFirstReportedDesc(
062      AcceptedState acceptedState);
063
064  /**
065   * Returns reports associated with the provided issue types ordered by first-reported time descending.
066   *
067   * @param issueTypes issue types.
068   * @return matching issue reports.
069   */
070  List<IssueReport> getIssueReportsByIssueTypesOrderByTimeFirstReportedDesc(
071      List<IssueType> issueTypes);
072
073  /**
074   * Returns reports whose last-modified time is within the provided range.
075   *
076   * @param timeLastModifiedAfter start of range (inclusive/exclusive depends on generated query).
077   * @param timeLastModifiedBefore end of range.
078   * @return matching issue reports.
079   */
080  List<IssueReport> getIssueReportsByTimeLastModifiedBetween(
081      Instant timeLastModifiedAfter, Instant timeLastModifiedBefore);
082}
